name: Another Chicken Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Cooked cut-up vegetables (such as carrots, broccoli, potatoes, cauliflower; frozen or fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart baking dish, combine the soup, milk, thyme, and pepper.
Stir in the vegetables and chicken.
2. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes or until the mixture begins to bubble.
Meanwhile, cut each biscuit into quarters.
3. Remove the dish from the oven; stir.
Arrange biscuit pieces over the hot chicken mixture.
Bake for an additional 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Variation: For added flavor, top with melted cheddar or Swiss cheese (grated) during the last 5 minutes of baking. Chicken can be substituted with turkey.
